data.title: Cathie Wood Reflects on ARK Invest's Early Bitcoin Adoption
data.description: Cathie Wood, CEO of ARK Invest, shared insights on the firm's initial investment in Bitcoin back in 2015. According to NS3.AI, Wood mentioned that ARK Invest faced widespread skepticism when it first took a position in Bitcoin. Despite the doubts, this skepticism fueled her interest in the technology. Wood now views Bitcoin as a representation of a global monetary system.

data.title: Crude Oil Prices Rise Amid Market Volatility
data.description: WTI crude oil prices increased by 0.55%, reaching $108.44 per barrel, while Brent crude saw a 0.65% rise to $117.80, according to NS3.AI. The market snapshot also indicated gold trading at $4,629.57 per ounce and silver at $74.404. Meanwhile, the volatility indexes for Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) experienced declines, reflecting a shift in market dynamics.

data.title: The X platform's Cashtags feature is now available on the web.
data.description: Nikita Bier, the product manager for X, stated in an article on the X platform that the Cashtags feature has been launched on the web, and X will become a core component of the user's trading terminal, providing real-time charts and posts for each asset.

data.title: Crude oil prices continued to climb, with WTI crude oil currently trading at $108 per barrel.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,629.57 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.16%. Silver prices rose to $74.404 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.95%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 41.08, a daily decrease of 0.77%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 57.42, a daily decrease of 3.30%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.02% to 6.82928. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.35% to 157.174. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 1.61% to 5,883.42 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.17% to 10,371.32 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 1.89% to 24,286.35 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 0.55% to $108.44 per barrel, and Brent crude oil rose 0.65% to $117.80 per barrel. Gate allows users to trade traditional financial market products directly on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: The Solana ecosystem DeFi protocol Carrot will be delisted, with May 14th being the deadline for withdrawing remaining funds.
data.description: Carrot, a DeFi protocol within the Solana ecosystem, announced that its continued operations have been severely impacted by the Drift vulnerability incident, and Carrot will be delisted. May 14th is the deadline for withdrawing remaining funds from Boost, Turbo, and CRT. Afterwards, deleveraging will begin, reducing all leverage to zero to release full liquidity for CRT redemptions.

data.title: Justin Sun Withdraws $3.2 Million USDT from Spark
data.description: Justin Sun has withdrawn an additional $3.2 million in USDT from the Spark DeFi protocol, according to on-chain analyst ai_9684xtpa. Since April 29, Sun's total withdrawals from the platform have amounted to $96.62 million.

data.title: Bitmine has staked another 162,000 ETH, worth approximately $366 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 8 hours ago, Tom Lee's Bitmine pledged another 162,088 ETH, worth $366 million. Currently, Bitmine has a total of 4,194,029 ETH pledged, worth $9.48 billion, representing 82.59% of its total ETH holdings.

data.title: Virgin Australia May Prolong Flight Reductions Amid Rising Fuel Costs Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: Virgin Australia is expected to continue reducing flights into the third quarter of 2026 as the ongoing conflict in Iran drives fuel prices higher, according to sources. Bloomberg posted on X that the airline's decision comes amid escalating fuel costs, which have been significantly impacted by the geopolitical tensions in the region. The prolonged flight cuts are part of Virgin Australia's strategy to manage operational expenses in response to the volatile fuel market. The airline is closely monitoring the situation and adjusting its operations accordingly to mitigate financial risks. This move reflects the broader challenges faced by airlines globally as they navigate the complexities of fluctuating fuel prices and geopolitical uncertainties.

Trump says he may need to break the Iran ceasefire agreement; 4. Trump: Doesn't care if Powell remains on the board; 5. data.title: Stripe Unveils Extensive Product Updates Including AI and Crypto Features
data.description: Stripe has announced 288 product updates, focusing on smart agent e-commerce, crypto payments, and AI risk control. According to PANews, the company has partnered with Meta and Google to enhance its e-commerce suite, introducing the Link proxy wallet and stablecoin-linked bank cards. Additionally, Stripe has upgraded its Radar fraud protection system to support AI enterprise growth and token asset management.

data.title: Solana ETF Experiences Significant Net Outflow
data.description:
On April 30, according to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicated that the Solana (SOL) spot ETF experienced a net outflow of $1.2396 million. The Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL) was the sole contributor to this outflow, with a single-day net outflow of $1.2396 million. Despite this, the historical total net inflow for GSOL has reached $103 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of the SOL spot ETF stands at $849 million, with a net asset ratio of 1.77%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $1.018 billion.

data.title: An address suspected to belong to Justin Sun has once again withdrawn 3.2 million USDT from Spark.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address suspected to belong to Justin Sun has withdrawn another 3.2 million USDT from Spark, bringing the total withdrawals since April 29th to $96.62 million in stablecoins. The address 0x939…6A1D1 currently holds $1.15 billion in Spark funds, including 1.02 billion USDS and 131 million USDC.

data.title: US stocks closed higher, with crypto-related stocks generally rising, and MARA surging over 11.85%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 1.62%, the S&P 500 rose 1.02%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.89%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose, with BNB Network up 11.87%, MARA up 11.85%, BTCS up 8.42%, DFDV up 8.4%, and RIOT up 7.88%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: North Korean hackers spent months making in-person contact with Drift Protocol employees before stealing $285 million.
data.description: North Korean spies, after spending months and holding multiple in-person meetings with Drift Protocol employees, carried out one of the largest social engineering attacks against the crypto protocol, stealing $285 million. According to TRM Labs, North Korean hacking accounted for 76% of all crypto hacking losses in 2026. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Iran Skeptical of Quick Resolution in U.S. Talks
data.description:
Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson, Bahram Qassemi, expressed skepticism about the possibility of swiftly reaching an agreement in negotiations with the United States. According to Odaily, Qassemi highlighted the deep mistrust and suspicion Iran has harbored towards U.S. actions since the victory of the Iranian Islamic Revolution 47 years ago.

He emphasized that expecting a quick resolution from the talks is unrealistic, describing the situation as an 'extremely bloody war.' Qassemi pointed to the severe actions of the United States and Israel, citing conflicts in Gaza and Lebanon over the past two and a half years as evidence.

Qassemi stated, 'In such circumstances, regardless of who the mediator is, expecting an agreement in a short time frame is unrealistic.'

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $1.2396 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the SOL spot ETF saw a net outflow of $1.2396 million yesterday (April 30th, Eastern Time). Only the Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $1.2396 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $103 million. As of press time, the SOL spot ETF's total net asset value is $849 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.77%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.018 billion.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $5.8284 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $5.8284 million yesterday (April 30th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $5.8284 million, while its historical total net inflow has reached $422 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $1.044 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.23%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.291 billion.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry: Expecting a swift outcome in Iran-US negotiations is unrealistic.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baghae stated that expecting a swift outcome in negotiations between Iran and the United States is unrealistic. Baghae said that in the 47 years since the victory of the Islamic Revolution, Iran has accumulated deep distrust and suspicion towards the actions of the United States. He emphasized that negotiations should not be expected to reach a result in a short period, "after all, this is an extremely bloody war." He pointed out that the United States and Israel are "extremely brutal," as evidenced by the conflicts in the Gaza Strip and Lebanon over the past two and a half years. Baghae said: "Under these circumstances, regardless of who the mediators are, expecting an agreement in a short time is unrealistic." (CCTV)

data.title: Polymarket Account Places $100,000 Bet on Denver Nuggets in Game 6
data.description: A Polymarket account, which previously incurred a loss of approximately $1.5 million, has placed a $100,000 wager on the Denver Nuggets to defeat the Minnesota Timberwolves in the Western Conference first-round Game 6. According to NS3.AI, this position was established roughly 50 minutes before the game started, with an average price of 73 cents.

data.title: NBA Playoffs: Timberwolves vs. Nuggets Game 6 Preview
data.description:
The NBA playoffs continue with the Western Conference first-round Game 6 between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Denver Nuggets. According to Odaily, a notable account with a loss of approximately $1.5 million recently invested $100,000 in favor of the Nuggets defeating the Timberwolves, with an opening price of 73¢.

The game is scheduled to start at 9:30 a.m. UTC+8. Currently, the Timberwolves lead the series 3-2 against the Nuggets. However, the Timberwolves face challenges as their star player, Anthony Edwards, is sidelined due to a knee injury. Additionally, Ayo Dosunmu will miss the game due to a calf injury, and Donte DiVincenzo is out for the season with a torn right Achilles tendon.

On the Nuggets' side, Aaron Gordon will not play due to left calf muscle tension, and Peyton Watson is also out with a right hamstring strain.
